sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n37823" key="e)pa/ggeltos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπάγγ-ελτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">η</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n37823.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">voluntary,</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">παραγενηθεὶς ἐπάγγελτος</foreign> coming forward <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">voluntarily,</tr_> ib. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0195.tlg001:708:21" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">708.21</biblScope> </bibl> (Istropolis, <date TEIform="date">ii B. C.</date>).</sense> </entryFree>
